info.title: Clara Care Line API
info.description: REST surface of the Clara server: an OpenAI-compatible custom-LLM endpoint that Vapi points at for each conversation turn, plus a health probe. Vapi owns all audio (STT/TTS/turn-taking); this server owns cognition — profile load, deterministic guardrail, model + care tools, memory. Emergency turns stream a fixed 911/988 script and never reach the LLM.

servers.description: Public HTTPS tunnel that the Vapi assistant's custom LLM URL points at (PUBLIC_URL in .env)

post.description: Handles one conversation turn. Always responds 200 with a `text/event-stream` body in the OpenAI `chat.completion.chunk` format — there is no non-streaming mode. Turn order: caller profile load (by phone number) → deterministic guardrail triage (emergencies get a fixed script, the model is never called) → model completion with grounded care tools → profile save. If a warm transfer to a telehealth clinician is warranted and `TELEHEALTH_TRANSFER_NUMBER` is configured, the stream emits a `transferCall` tool-call chunk that Vapi executes.

messages.content: I have a sore throat, what can I take?

200.description: Server-sent event stream. Each event is `data: <JSON>` where the JSON is an OpenAI `chat.completion.chunk`; the stream ends with `data: [DONE]`. Two shapes occur: assistant text deltas (finish_reason `stop`), or a single `transferCall` tool-call delta (finish_reason `tool_calls`) when warm-transferring the caller. Model errors degrade to a spoken apology — the stream itself never errors.

schema.description: Stream of ChatCompletionChunk events terminated by [DONE]. See components.schemas.ChatCompletionChunk for the per-event payload.

ChatRequest.description: Vapi custom-LLM request. Voice turns include Vapi's `call` object (used to detect the voice channel and the caller's number for profile continuity); SMS/chat sessions may carry `customer` at the top level instead. Unknown callers are served without a profile — the turn never fails on a missing number.

messages.description: Conversation so far, OpenAI chat format. The last `user` message is the utterance triaged by the guardrail.

call.description: Present on voice turns (sent by Vapi).

customer.description: Fallback caller identity for non-voice (SMS/chat) sessions.

ChatCompletionChunk.description: Payload of each SSE `data:` event (OpenAI chat.completion.chunk).

tool_calls.description: Present only on the warm-transfer chunk.
